description: Deterministic first-wave fixtures for legacy Sun RPC compatibility symbols. The cases bind FrankenLibC's native TLS accessors and safe-default client/auth behavior without network access or host RPC state.
spec_reference: glibc Sun RPC compatibility surface; FrankenLibC rpc_abi deterministic safe-default contract

cases.name: __rpc_thread_createerr_tls_accessor_strict
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC thread-local rpc_createerr compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns non-null per-thread rpc_createerr storage
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic TLS accessor; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: thread-local compatibility storage is native and does not require host RPC runtime state

cases.name: __rpc_thread_createerr_tls_accessor_hardened
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC thread-local rpc_createerr compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns non-null per-thread rpc_createerr storage
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic TLS accessor; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: thread-local compatibility storage is native and does not require host RPC runtime state

cases.name: __rpc_thread_svc_fdset_tls_accessor_strict
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC thread-local svc_fdset compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns non-null zeroed per-thread fd_set storage
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic TLS accessor; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: thread-local compatibility storage is native and does not require host RPC runtime state

cases.name: __rpc_thread_svc_fdset_tls_accessor_hardened
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC thread-local svc_fdset compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns non-null zeroed per-thread fd_set storage
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic TLS accessor; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: thread-local compatibility storage is native and does not require host RPC runtime state

cases.name: __rpc_thread_svc_max_pollfd_tls_accessor_strict
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC thread-local svc_max_pollfd compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns non-null per-thread integer storage initialized to zero
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic TLS accessor; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: thread-local compatibility storage is native and does not require host RPC runtime state

cases.name: __rpc_thread_svc_max_pollfd_tls_accessor_hardened
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC thread-local svc_max_pollfd compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns non-null per-thread integer storage initialized to zero
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic TLS accessor; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: thread-local compatibility storage is native and does not require host RPC runtime state

cases.name: __rpc_thread_svc_pollfd_tls_accessor_strict
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC thread-local svc_pollfd compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns non-null per-thread pointer slot initialized to NULL
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic TLS accessor; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: thread-local compatibility storage is native and does not require host RPC runtime state

cases.name: __rpc_thread_svc_pollfd_tls_accessor_hardened
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC thread-local svc_pollfd compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns non-null per-thread pointer slot initialized to NULL
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic TLS accessor; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: thread-local compatibility storage is native and does not require host RPC runtime state

cases.name: _authenticate_safe_default_strict
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC server authentication compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns 0 failure without consulting host RPC state
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic failure result; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: legacy RPC authentication is intentionally unsupported and fails closed

cases.name: _authenticate_safe_default_hardened
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC server authentication compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns 0 failure without consulting host RPC state
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic failure result; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: legacy RPC authentication is intentionally unsupported and fails closed

cases.name: _null_auth_global_zero_strict
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC null auth global compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: exposes zeroed opaque_auth storage
inputs.hardened_behavior: same zeroed compatibility storage; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: null authentication has no ambient network dependency

cases.name: _null_auth_global_zero_hardened
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC null auth global compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: exposes zeroed opaque_auth storage
inputs.hardened_behavior: same zeroed compatibility storage; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: null authentication has no ambient network dependency

cases.name: _rpc_dtablesize_fdset_clamp_strict
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC descriptor table sizing compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns a positive descriptor bound clamped to FD_SETSIZE
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic descriptor bound; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: descriptor sizing is local process metadata and does not require RPC runtime state

cases.name: _rpc_dtablesize_fdset_clamp_hardened
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC descriptor table sizing compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns a positive descriptor bound clamped to FD_SETSIZE
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic descriptor bound; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: descriptor sizing is local process metadata and does not require RPC runtime state

cases.name: _seterr_reply_success_zeroing_strict
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC reply error extraction compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: zeroes rpc_err storage for an accepted success reply
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic local zeroing; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: reply decoding is local byte-structure handling and does not require network access

cases.name: _seterr_reply_success_zeroing_hardened
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC reply error extraction compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: zeroes rpc_err storage for an accepted success reply
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic local zeroing; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: reply decoding is local byte-structure handling and does not require network access

cases.name: authdes_create_safe_default_strict
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC DES auth creation compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns NULL because DES RPC auth is unsupported
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic NULL result; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: DES-backed legacy RPC auth is intentionally unsupported and fails closed
